4.title: section_4
4.html:
Redoran Watchman's HelmetCC[edit]

The Redoran Watchman's Helmet is a variant helmet added by the Ghosts of the Tribunal Creation. It has a higher armor rating and value than the regular helmet. In terms of armor rating-to-weight ratio (i.e. the number of armor points per unit of weight), it has the highest ratio in the game.

Name (ID) Raw Materials Delta Ratio
N Leather Iron Chitin
Redoran Watchman's Helmet
(xx04D170)		 1 300 15 1 1 3 -5 268 0.17 9.38
Totals (with full chitin set): 16 855 86.5 6 5 17
Totals (without shield): 8 640 62 5 4 13

  • A male Nord wearing a Redoran watchman's helmet

  • A female Imperial wearing a Redoran watchman's helmet

7.title: Indoril Armor
7.html:
Indoril ArmorCC[edit]

Indoril Armor is a craftable heavy armor set added by the Ghosts of the Tribunal Creation. Every piece of the set requires a chitin plate to be improved. The set has its own material keyword for the Matching Set perk, which includes the Ordinator shield.

Its stats are identical to those of steel plate armor, save for the cuirass' value. It also comes with a matching shield.

A male Nord wearing Indoril armor

8.title: Her Hand Armor
8.html:
Her Hand ArmorCC[edit]

Added by the Ghosts of the Tribunal Creation, Her Hand Armor Set is an equipment set worn by Almalexia's personal guardians. Although Almalexia is gone, the armor is still used by members of a cult dedicated to the Tribunal. The set consists entirely of heavy armor. Every piece of the set requires a chitin plate to be improved. The set has its own material keyword for the Matching Set perk.

The armor can be crafted after killing Hand Kenro Hlan during the Ghosts of the Tribunal quest. The total armor rating matches that of ebony armor, but this set is lighter and costs less. It also lacks a matching shield.

A female Imperial wearing Her Hand armor
